steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly signals its structure with “contrast”: “Both centers contrast with museums that aren't Indigenous-led.” The passage first presents two tribal centers and their Indigenous-centered approach, then contrasts them with non-Indigenous institutions.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content: Choice B correctly identifies the structure: the passage discusses two tribal centers and their Indigenous-centered design approach, then contrasts them with non-Indigenous institutions that use Euro-centric strategies. The other choices either add temporal distinctions absent from the text (A), invent specific artifacts never mentioned (C), or shift focus from design philosophy to audience response (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
